goal: 完成 P3/P4 Execution Host 与 Site Runtime 边界压实

summary.title: 压实 Execution Host 与 Site Runtime 边界
summary.what: Execution Host health/error 进入 canonical host record、runtime.summary 和 runtime.capture_diagnostics；Site Runtime 从生成 InterventionRequest 改为只返回 handoff draft；runtime-services / background bridge 负责把 handoff draft 转成 kernel intervention lifecycle；page.query/click/fill 的隐式 handoff 策略移到 runtime 层。
summary.why: P3 要把本地/远程 execution host 当作 AI Surface 的一等执行面，P4 要让 site-runtime 只保留站点匹配、注入、action、verifier、stabilization，不再承载产品编排和 intervention lifecycle。
summary.user_goal: 完成 P3/P4 Execution Host 与 Site Runtime 边界压实

decisions.point: Execution Host 状态进入哪个 surface
decisions.chose: 扩展 ExecutionHostRecord / HostBootstrapSummaryItem，并把 HostsBootstrapSummary 放进 RuntimeBootstrapSummary 与 RuntimeDiagnosticsPayload。
decisions.rationale: 这样 runtime.summary、hosts.summary、runtime.capture_diagnostics 使用同一份 host truth，host degraded/error 能进入统一 runtime 状态。

decisions.point: Site Runtime 如何表达需要人工接管
decisions.chose: Site Runtime 只返回 SiteActionHandoffRequest draft，不生成 id/status/session lifecycle。
decisions.rationale: id/status/session/audit/expiresAt 属于 runtime/kernel intervention lifecycle，不属于站点执行层。

decisions.point: bbl.page 的隐式 handoff 规则放在哪里
decisions.chose: 把 page.query/click/fill 的 verify_failed/runtime_blocked handoff policy 放到 runtime-services。
decisions.rationale: page action 的产品规则属于 Runtime Control Plane；site-runtime 只消费调用方传入的 handoff policy。

rejected.alternative: 继续让 site-runtime 直接构造 InterventionRequest
rejected.reason: 这会把 intervention lifecycle 和产品编排沉到站点执行层，违反 P4 边界。

rejected.alternative: runtime.summary 只保留不含 health/error 的简化 host items
rejected.reason: 这会让 host 失败仍只能从分散 diagnostics 里推断，不能满足 P3 的统一 runtime summary 要求。

review_notes: 保留 site.runtime.invoke 输入中的 legacy intervention alias，由 runtime-services 转成 handoff policy，降低调用方迁移风险。
验证已通过：聚焦 P3/P4 测试 270 passed；bun run check 通过，包含 typecheck、biome check 和全量 Vitest 711 passed。
当前收口到本地 main commit 和 Mainline seal；未 push、未开 PR。

architectural_claims: Execution Host registry state is now part of runtime bootstrap and diagnostics truth, not only separate host operations.
Site Runtime owns site match, injection, action, verifier, and stabilization; intervention lifecycle is created in runtime/kernel.
Runtime services now own product-level page action handoff policy for bbl.page query/click/fill.
behavioral_changes: runtime.capture_diagnostics includes hosts summary and degrades runtime status when host summary is degraded.
runtime.bootstrap reuses diagnostics hosts summary, includes host health/error in runtime.hosts and top-level hosts, and propagates host errors into runtime.lastError.
site-runtime handoff results no longer contain id or status; runtime-services converts them into kernel intervention records.
page.query/click/fill verification or runtime-blocked failures still create intervention records, but through runtime-owned handoff policy.
security_implications: No new permissions or secret-bearing fields were added.
Host errors are structured code/message/details; callers must avoid putting secrets in error details as before.
migration_notes: Direct site-runtime callers should pass handoff or handoffs instead of intervention.
MV3 runtime-services still accepts legacy intervention input as a compatibility alias and converts it to handoff before invoking site-runtime.
